final_prompt.prompt:
Design a monochrome logo — five abstracted, sweeping vector forms.

Style/medium: flat vector logo, purely flat, clean crisp edges
Composition:
  five abstracted sweeping forms resembling dynamic arrows or chevrons
  overlapping intersections create a complex kinetic geometric pattern
  forms converge at a single point
Subject: abstract logo mark symbolizing unified purpose and forward momentum
Scene/backdrop:
Lighting/mood: dynamic yet profoundly sophisticated
Color palette: solid black and white only, monochrome
Materials/textures: high-definition lines, no gradients, no texture
Text (verbatim):
Constraints: no text, no letterforms
Avoid: gray tones, drop shadows, decorative elements, realistic or 3D rendering
